exec: pm.test("Save token to collection variable", function () {
const response = pm.response.json(); // Parse the response JSON
const token = response.data?.accessToken; // Adjust this to match the token path in your response
if (token) {
pm.collectionVariables.set("USER", token); // Save to collection scope
console.log("Token saved in collection variable:", token);
} else {
console.error("Token not found in the response");
pm.collectionVariables.unset("userToken");
